calendar.matters:
Petition For Modification Of Trust
Off Calendar Dec-12-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Bobby Lydon-lam for Kwong Lee.

The Court stated that modification to the Trust is agreed to by all of the Beneficiaries and is premised on the change in federal tax laws. Mr. Lydon-Lam stated that there are no objections by anyone. The Court stated that it thinks due to the change in language in Probate Code 15403, the Parties are entitled to this at this point. The Court granted the Petition for Modification of Trust (subject to review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
